name: AutoEval
description: AI-based automated code evaluation system for programming assignments and technical screening.
objective: Evaluate submitted code with test cases, quality signals, and AI-assisted feedback.
businessObjective: Help institutions and recruiters reduce manual coding assessment effort.
realWorldImpact: Improves evaluation speed, consistency, and feedback quality for learners and candidates.

name: HFT Trading System in C++
description: Low-latency trading system prototype demonstrating C++ performance engineering and market simulation.
objective: Build a fast, modular trading engine with order processing and strategy simulation.
businessObjective: Demonstrate systems programming capability for finance and performance-critical software roles.
realWorldImpact: Shows understanding of latency, memory, architecture, and reliability constraints.

name: Resume Screening with NLP
description: NLP system that ranks resumes against job descriptions using skill extraction and semantic matching.
objective: Assist recruiters with faster and more transparent resume screening.
businessObjective: Reduce manual resume review time and improve candidate-job matching.
realWorldImpact: Helps job seekers and recruiters identify fit, gaps, and opportunities.

name: RAG-based Knowledge Assistant
description: Retrieval augmented generation assistant for answering questions from internal documents.
objective: Create a reliable assistant that retrieves source-grounded answers from knowledge bases.
businessObjective: Help teams search policies, documentation, training material, and business knowledge.
realWorldImpact: Reduces time spent searching documents and improves knowledge access.

name: Data Science Dashboard
description: Interactive dashboard for exploratory data analysis, KPI tracking, and visual storytelling.
objective: Transform raw datasets into useful charts, metrics, and business insights.
businessObjective: Give businesses a clear view of operations, trends, and decision metrics.
realWorldImpact: Improves reporting quality and makes analytics accessible to non-technical users.

name: Django LMS Platform
description: Learning management system with courses, lessons, user progress, assignments, and admin workflows.
objective: Build a scalable education platform for institutions and training programs.
businessObjective: Support digital education delivery and structured learner management.
realWorldImpact: Enables online courses, learner tracking, and project-based instruction.

name: FastAPI Microservices Platform
description: Microservices reference platform with API gateway patterns, modular services, and deployment readiness.
objective: Demonstrate modern backend engineering using service-oriented architecture.
businessObjective: Help businesses build modular APIs that can scale by feature and service boundary.
realWorldImpact: Shows backend readiness for enterprise systems, APIs, and integrations.
